channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump names former CIA official Ron Johnson as ambassador to Mexico
item.description: President-elect Trump on Tuesday announced his one-time ambassador to El Salvador, Ron Johnson, would serve as ambassador to Mexico in his upcoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: GOP Armed Services chair criticizes ban on gender-affirming care for minors in NDAA
item.description: House Armed Services Committee Chair Mike Rogers (R-Ala.) on Tuesday lamented the inclusion of a provision banning coverage of gender-affirming care for minors in the annual defense authorization bill, saying that Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) did not consult him about it.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida state lawmaker files measure eliminating tuition aid for undocumented immigrants
item.description: Florida state Sen. Randy Fine (R) announced Monday he was introducing a bill to limit college tuition aid to undocumented immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: Fox News Politics: A New Trump in Town
item.description: The Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump transition, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israel's UN ambassador insists nation is 'not getting involved' in Syrian regime change
item.description: A top Israeli diplomat insisted his nation is "not getting involved" in Syria’s politics after the nation launched an aggressive campaign of airstrikes and seized control of a buffer zone in Syria.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Donald Trump is returning to the world stage. So is his trolling
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s recent dinner with Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau and his visit to Paris for the reopening of the Notre Dame Cathedral were not just exercises in policy and diplomacy.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price And Rob Gillies, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump's incoming border czar reveals he's already making plans for 1,400 acres of land offered by Texas
item.description: Incoming border czar Tom Homan says he is already making plans on what to do with a chunk of land offered to the incoming administration by Texas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US says it will support new Syrian leaders who protect women and renounce terrorism
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration said Tuesday it will recognize and support a new Syrian government that renounces terrorism, destroys chemical weapons stocks and protects the rights of minorities and women. Secretary of State Antony Blinken said in a statement that the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, AAMER MADHANI and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden admin report could slow Trump's efforts to unleash domestic natural gas, experts say
item.description: A report from the Biden administration on the environmental and economic impacts of increasing exports of liquefied natural gas could pose delays for Donald Trump's efforts to immediately authorize new licenses for the fuel, experts say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supreme Court leans toward Utah oil railway plan, but may not make broad environmental ruling
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court seemed to favor a Utah oil railroad expansion in arguments on Tuesday, but appeared more skeptical of putting strict new limits on a key national environmental law.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump trolls Trudeau as 'governor' of Canada
item.description: President-elect Trump mocked Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau, calling him the "governor" of the "Great State of Canada.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: James Comer predicts Biden will pardon his brother Jim
item.description: “I do think he’ll pardon other family members. He’s going to have to,” Comer said in the clip highlighted by Grabien.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: House advances annual defense policy bill, teeing up final vote
item.description: The House advanced the annual defense policy bill on Tuesday, teeing up the mammoth measure for a final vote later this week. The chamber voted 211-207 along party lines to adopt the rule — which governs debate for legislation — for the sprawling bill, formally opening up debate in the chamber.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Sen. McConnell reportedly fine after falling during GOP lunch
item.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell fell during a GOP lunch on Tuesday and was met with a wheelchair and emergency crews in his office on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meet Natalie Harp, Trump's 'valuable resource' who lawmakers say is 'critical' to his operation
item.description: Lawmakers who communicate with President-elect Trump’s assistant Natalie Harp regularly told Fox News Digital that she is "critical" in ensuring Congress is a "real partner" for the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House panel holds drone hearing
item.description: Capitol Hill has taken notice of recent, mysterious drone sightings across the Northeast and is hoping to get to the bottom of the mystery.
item.dc:creator: Joe Khalil, NewsNation

item.title: Kash Patel FBI plans spark concern over agency independence, retribution
item.description: Kash Patel hasn’t offered specifics on his plans for the FBI, but he’s made it clear that sweeping changes are on the table.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Pelosi says she backs generational change on committees, but there are exceptions
item.description: Rep. Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.) said this week that she supports the push for younger Democrats to replace veteran lawmakers at the top of committees — but there is at least one glaring exception to the rule.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Greene says she is safe after bomb threat
item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) confirmed she is safe after reports swirled of an email sent to law enforcement containing a bomb threat targeting the lawmaker.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Surgeon general pick accidentally set off gun, killing dad: Report
item.description: Nesheiwat has publicly referenced her father's death multiple times, though she has never mentioned her connection to the accident.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk warns Republicans against standing in Trump's way — or his
item.description: DES MOINES, Iowa (AP) — A week after President-elect Donald Trump’s victory, Elon Musk said his political action committee would “play a significant role in primaries.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, JULIET LINDERMAN and MARTHA MENDOZA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Susan Wild absent from Ethics Committee meeting after Gaetz leaks to press
item.description: Rep. Susan Wild (Pa.), the top Democrat on the House Ethics Committee, was absent from the panel’s meeting last week after being traced as the source of leaks to the press regarding the investigation into former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.), sources told The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US hostage envoy in Beirut to seek information on missing journalist Austin Tice
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The U.S. government's top hostage negotiator is in Beirut in hopes of collecting information on the whereabouts of Austin Tice, an American journalist missing in Syria for 12 years, the State Department said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Florida State Rep. Susan Valdes, representing parts of Hillsborough County, switches political parties
item.description: State Rep. Susan Valdes, who represents Florida's 64th District, including parts of Hillsborough County, switched political parties, the Florida House of Representatives announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: House Republican eyes Medicare, Social Security for DOGE cuts
item.description: Rep. Mark Alford (R-Mo.) is floating Medicare and Social Security as potential areas of focus for President-elect Trump’s new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Trump suspect requests delay of attempted assassination trial
item.description: The attorneys said preparing a "case of this magnitude" for trial could not be done well by the established Feb. 10 trial date.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: How measles, whooping cough and worse could roar back on RFK Jr.’s watch
item.description: With anti-vaccine activist Robert F. Kennedy Jr. in charge of the nation’s biggest health agency, it wouldn’t take much tampering to enable vaccine-preventable diseases to make a comeback.
item.dc:creator: Arthur Allen, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota U.S. Attorney Andy Luger to step down ahead of Trump transition
item.description: U.S. Attorney Andy Luger is stepping down soon as the top federal law enforcement official in Minnesota. As is custom for political appointees, he’s resigning to make way for a yet-to-be-announced successor chosen by incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Matt Sepic, MPR News

item.title: Talking Sense: Coming together to solve tough problems
item.description: Mariah Levison and Rob Fersh help people find consensus on how to solve divisive issues, ranging from prison reform to what art should hang in the Minnesota Capitol. Learn how they do it in this MPR News Talking Sense conversation hosted by MPR News correspondent Catharine Richert.
item.dc:creator: Angela Davis, Catharine Richert, Maja Beckstrom, and Annie Baxter, MPR News

item.title: Steven Horsford to hand off role as chair of Congressional Black Caucus
item.description: Nevada Congressman Steven Horsford will no longer be the chair of the Congressional Black Caucus for the 119th Congress.
item.dc:creator: Linsey Lewis, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Minneapolis City Council member Emily Koski joins mayor’s race
item.description: She joins Minnesota DFL Sen. Omar Fateh and the Rev. DeWayne Davis of Plymouth Congregational Church in challenging Mayor Jacob Frey, who’s running for reelection.
item.dc:creator: Megan Burks, MPR News

item.title: Montana lawmakers cross the aisle to block a trans bathroom ban in the state capitol
item.description: Some Republicans joined Democrats in rejecting the measure, which would have restricted bathroom access. Rep. Zooey Zephyr, Montana's first openly transgender legislator, won a second term last month.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman, MPR News

item.title: Supreme Court hears challenge to law banning gender-affirming care for trans kids
item.description: At issue is a Tennessee law that bans access to hormones, puberty blockers, and other treatments for trans kids in the state.
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg, MPR News
